service_redirects.message: Use restart.sh for service management or worktree-services.sh start/stop <task-id> for worktree services. Never manage services via systemctl directly.
Never kill service processes directly. Use restart.sh to restart services or worktree-services.sh stop <task-id> for worktree services.
Never start app servers directly. Use restart.sh for main services or worktree-services.sh start <task-id> for worktree services.
Never start app servers directly. Use restart.sh for main services or worktree-services.sh start <task-id> for worktree services.
Never start dev servers directly. Use restart.sh for main services or worktree-services.sh start <task-id> for worktree services.
Never start dev servers directly. Use restart.sh for main services or worktree-services.sh start <task-id> for worktree services.

Use 'db' CLI instead of raw psql. Commands: db tables [--counts], db schema <table>, db sample <table> [n], db query "SELECT...", db exec "UPDATE/DELETE...", db ddl "CREATE INDEX...", db count <table>. Use db -P <project> to target a specific project (summitflow, agent-hub, portfolio-ai, hatchet).
